attributes.name: Parent & Tot - Saturday 9:15am
attributes.description: NOTE: No sticks or pucks are allowed on the ice during ice skating lessons. Parent & Tot is a one hour skating session designed especially for our youngest tots. A 15-minute lesson will be offered each week and the rink will be set up with games and activities for you to play with your tot. The session is for 2–5-year-old skaters accompanied by one parent. Cost includes skate rental and admission for parent and tot. There are no refunds, make ups or credits for missed classes.
